_meta.description: Real NBA player card config. Every remaining quality contains 100 real-player cards. Pre-rookie qualities were removed.
_meta.name_rule: Display names use the approved Chinese prefix from the matching avatar filename; fallback generation replaces one character of the translated surname with a near-homophone.
_meta.quality_rule: Quality is a game rarity tier. High quality pools prioritize active stars, NBA 75, strong non-selected stars, and Hall-of-Fame level players.
_meta.nba2k_rule: NBA 2K25 overall/potential is used as an additional high-ceiling signal. Potential 95+ players can enter high-quality pools; 90+ young players are promoted in starter-to-best-lineup pools.
_meta.alltime_reference_rule: NBA 2K27 all-time team rosters are used as the primary recognizability reference.
_meta.fame_priority_rule: Every player may appear in every quality. Ranking priority is fame, active era, real role history, then recent rookie strength.

Victor Wembanyama.reason: NBA 2K25 potential 99; treated as rookie-to-GOAT ceiling except bench tiers.

_meta.cba_replacement_rule: Mainland Chinese CBA regular-season MVP and Finals MVP stars replace selected NBA cards in every remaining quality pool.
_meta.chinese_special_rule: Chinese-national special players are included in every quality. Their GOAT cards use full attributes.
